summary: The implementation addresses all four requirements with comprehensive logging, error handling, and paste ID verification. Frontend changes include enhanced error display with paste IDs and diagnostic details. Backend changes add logging throughout createPaste and getPaste, though the backend diff is truncated preventing full verification of the storage fix implementation.

hallucinated_features.description: Added comprehensive frontend logging throughout paste creation flow including logging of message length, file count, expiration type, password presence, file processing details, and backend responses
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 only requested backend logging for createPaste and getPaste functions. The extensive frontend logging in useQueries.ts was not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Added paste verification call after creation that immediately calls getPaste to verify the paste was stored correctly
hallucinated_features.reason: While REQ-1 requires verifying that createPaste properly stores data and getPaste can retrieve it, the requirement does not specify adding an immediate verification call after creation. This appears to be an implementation detail beyond the requirement scope.
